retry_policy_summary.tool_timeout: 1 rerun if infrastructure timeout; none if model caused invalid call
retry_policy_summary.oom: 2 reruns for the same matrix row
retry_policy_summary.model_unload_failure: 1 rerun only if cleanup is uncertain

parser_policy.contract: Parse model output without repair; invalid JSON raises ModelOutputFailure.

serialization_policy.contract: JSONL rows are written deterministically and hashed after write.

checkpoint_controls.duplicate_trial_id_prevention: reject duplicate trial_id values within a shard and across reruns unless a rerun suffix is generated
